title: Mikiwski Task Adventure
description: A mod adding a task system with increasing difficulty, rewards, and HUD/GUI interface. Complete tasks, earn XP and items, progress through 20 levels of challenges!
body:
A mod adding a task system with increasing difficulty, rewards, and HUD/GUI interface. Complete tasks, earn XP and items, progress through 20 levels of challenges!

Features:

- 20 progressive task levels
- 3 active tasks simultaneously
- In-game HUD showing active tasks
- Full GUI task list (press J to open)
- XP and item rewards
- Animated completion overlay
- Polish and English translations
